# WB Gallery

Interactive chart and map examples with World Bank color palettes. Select a chart type, pick a palette, and copy the Python code.

---

## Chart Examples

Select a chart type, pick a WB palette, and copy the Plotly Python code.

```{raw} html
<div id="wb-gallery-root">

  <!-- Chart type tabs -->
  <div class="wg-tabs" role="tablist" aria-label="Chart type">
    <button class="wg-tab wg-tab-active" data-chart="bar" role="tab" aria-selected="true">Horizontal Bar</button>
    <button class="wg-tab" data-chart="line" role="tab" aria-selected="false">Line Chart</button>
    <button class="wg-tab" data-chart="scatter" role="tab" aria-selected="false">Scatter Plot</button>
  </div>

  <!-- Two-column: chart left (60%), code right (40%) -->
  <div class="wg-chart-layout">

    <!-- Chart pane -->
    <div class="wg-chart-area">
      <div id="wg-chart-container">
        <div class="wg-chart-skeleton">Loading chart&hellip;</div>
      </div>
      <p class="wg-chart-hint" id="wg-chart-hint">&larr; Select a palette below to update this chart</p>
    </div>

    <!-- Code pane -->
    <div class="wg-code-pane">
      <div class="wg-code-label">Python (Plotly Express)</div>
      <div class="wg-code-block">
        <pre id="wg-chart-code"></pre>
        <button class="wg-copy-btn" id="wg-copy-chart-code">Copy code</button>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div><!-- /.wg-chart-layout -->

  <!-- Palette chip selector -->
  <div class="wg-palette-selector">
    <div class="wg-palette-label">Palette</div>
    <div class="wg-chips" id="wg-palette-chips" role="listbox" aria-label="Select palette"></div>
  </div>

</div><!-- /#wb-gallery-root -->
```

---

## Map Color Ramps

Select a WB color ramp to preview it on a sample choropleth map. Copy the Plotly Python code to apply the ramp in your own notebooks.

```{raw} html
<div id="wg-map-section">

  <!-- Two-column: map + ramp selector -->
  <div class="wg-map-layout">

    <!-- SVG map — Jordan governorates, Natural Earth data, grouped into 5 population-density bins -->
    <!-- region-0 = sparsest (Ma'an, Mafraq), region-4 = densest (Amman, Irbid, Balqa)           -->
    <div class="wg-map-area">
      <svg id="wg-map-svg" viewBox="0 0 500 600" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
           aria-label="Jordan governorates choropleth map (5 quantile bins)" role="img"
           style="width:100%;height:auto;max-height:400px;">
        <!-- region-0: Ma'an + Mafraq (vast desert, lowest density) -->
        <path id="region-0" d="M276.39,321.89 L291.37,339.25 L291.73,339.70 L292.10,340.16 L292.45,340.62 L292.82,341.08 L305.45,357.05 L318.09,373.00 L330.74,388.95 L343.36,404.91 L349.06,412.11     <!-- Ramp selector + code -->
    <div>
      <div class="wg-palette-label" style="margin-bottom:8px;">Color Ramp</div>
      <div class="wg-ramp-selector" id="wg-ramp-rows" role="radiogroup" aria-label="Select color ramp">
        <!-- Populated by wb-gallery.js -->
      </div>

      <div class="wg-code-label" style="margin-top:20px;margin-bottom:8px;">Python (Plotly choropleth)</div>
      <div class="wg-code-block">
        <pre id="wg-map-code"></pre>
        <button class="wg-copy-btn" id="wg-copy-map-code">Copy code</button>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div><!-- /.wg-map-layout -->

</div><!-- /#wg-map-section -->
```
